project.name: War & Current Affairs Dashboard
project.description: Comprehensive tracking system for global conflicts, geopolitical developments, and current affairs with real-time data integration
data_sources: OCHA (UN Office for Coordination of Humanitarian Affairs)

accuracy_standards.source_verification: All information must be cross-referenced with at least 2 reliable sources
accuracy_standards.timestamps: Every update must include verification timestamp
accuracy_standards.distinction: Clearly separate confirmed events from unconfirmed reports
accuracy_standards.attribution: Always cite sources for statistics and claims
accuracy_standards.update_frequency: Critical events updated within 24 hours of verification

body.name: War & Current Affairs Dashboard
body.body: Comprehensive tracking system for global conflicts, geopolitical developments, and current affairs with real-time data integration. Features: Active Conflicts, Military Operations, Humanitarian Crisis, Geopolitical Developments, Peace Negotiations, International Response & Sanctions, Real-time Current Affairs, and Statistical Data.

implementation_guide.step_1: Generate GitHub Personal Access Token with 'repo' and 'project' scopes
implementation_guide.step_2: Execute POST request to create project using the endpoint above
implementation_guide.step_3: Create columns for each section (Active Conflicts, Military Ops, etc.)
implementation_guide.step_4: Add issues/cards for each tracked event or conflict
implementation_guide.step_5: Set up automated webhooks for real-time updates
implementation_guide.step_6: Configure data validation rules for accuracy
implementation_guide.step_7: Enable team collaboration with proper permissions
implementation_guide.step_8: Set up notifications for critical updates

example_curl_command: curl -X POST -H "Accept: application/vnd.github.inertia-preview+json" -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_GITHUB_TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" https://api.github.com/repos/ARUSHAMMU262007/automotive-cybersecurity/projects -d '{"name":"War & Current Affairs Dashboard","body":"Comprehensive tracking system for global conflicts, geopolitical developments, and current affairs with real-time data integration"}'
